videos.headline: Penn State knocks off USC in OT on FG, improving to 6-0
videos.description: Ryan Barker's kick is true as Penn State holds on to defeat USC in overtime for a 33-30 victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penn State knocks off USC in OT on FG, improving to 6-0) 2024/10/12

videos.headline: Quinten Joyner goes off for 75-yard USC TD
videos.description: Quinten Joyner rushes for a 75-yard touchdown to give USC the lead vs. Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinten Joyner goes off for 75-yard USC TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Warren makes miraculous catch for Penn State TD on trick play
videos.description: Tyler Warren makes an improbable catch from Drew Allar to reduce Penn State's deficit vs. USC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Warren makes miraculous catch for Penn State TD on trick play) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: James Franklin stops Penn State players from planting flag
videos.description: Penn State players try to plant the "We Are" flag at midfield before coach James Franklin stops them.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Misc. (James Franklin stops Penn State players from planting flag) 2024/10/12 3PV
